title: What's new with Gemini from Google DeepMind
summary: Google DeepMind presented advances in Gemini 3, featuring upgraded model reasoning, expanded context windows, and enhanced multimodal tool use. The presentation focused on agentic applications and agent design research advancements in Vertex AI.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech presents Google DeepMind's overview of Gemini 3, covering upgraded model reasoning, expanded context windows, and enhanced multimodal tool use. The focus falls on agentic applications and agent design research within Vertex AI. Key takeaways: longer context windows support long-context reasoning, multimodal tool use extends what the models can act on, and the agentic direction ties these capabilities into Vertex AI workflows.
